2.t: Hath this been in your days
Hath this been in your days

6.t: and he hath the cheek teeth

20.t: also unto thee for the rivers

1.t: for it is nigh at hand

2.t: the like neither shall be any more

9.t: They shall run to and fro

12.t: ye even to me with all your heart

19.t: therewith and I will no more make

20.t: But I will remove far off

23.t: and he will cause to come down

27.t: that I am in the midst
and that I am the LORD
and none else and my people

28.t: And it shall come to pass afterward

32.t: And it shall come to pass that whosoever shall call
And it shall come to pass that whosoever shall call

2.t: with them there for my people

4.t: Yea and what have ye to do with me O Tyre

18.t: And it shall come to pass in that day
